title: EVENTSCREW/SALES ASSOCIATE
description:
Company Overview / Employee Value Proposition

We are a results-driven outsourced sales and marketing company that partners with reputable brands to accelerate customer acquisition, market expansion, and revenue growth. By deploying highly trained, performance-focused teams, we act as a seamless extension of our clients’ sales operations. What We Do We specialise in direct sales, field marketing, and customer acquisition, executing high-impact campaigns through events, roadshows, and face-to-face engagements. Our approach combines structured training, data-driven performance management, and consistent on-ground execution to deliver measurable results for our partners. Our People & Culture We invest heavily in people development. Team members receive continuous coaching, leadership training, and clear career progression opportunities. High performers are recognised through incentives, leadership roles, and overseas exposure, creating a culture that rewards ambition, discipline, and results. Our Mission To help brands grow efficiently while developing top-tier sales professionals through structured systems, real-world experience, and performance-based advancement.

Job Summary

You will engage customers face-to-face to represent brand campaigns professionally, create positive experiences that build trust, and guide customers toward solutions that meet their needs while working with a motivated team to achieve targets.

Responsibilities

  • Initiate conversations and engage customers directly in high-footfall consumer environments to increase brand visibility and impact
  • Represent brand campaigns professionally to ensure consistent and positive brand messaging
  • Create memorable customer experiences that build trust and encourage ongoing engagement
  • Assess customer needs and guide them toward appropriate solutions that align with their preferences
  • Collaborate with team members to meet and exceed sales targets through coordinated efforts
  • Participate actively in training and coaching sessions to continuously improve communication and presentation skills

Preferred competencies and qualifications

  • Energetic, outgoing, and curious attitude to engage diverse customers effectively
  • Comfortable initiating conversations with new people in various settings
  • No prior experience required; willingness to learn through full training and coaching provided
